name: Private 3BR Villa with Pool & Garden

location.address: Chemin 20 Pieds, La Mare Ronde, 30513 Grand Baie, Mauritius

pool_access.location: Private pool in the villa garden.

building_context.notes: Private 3-bedroom villa in a quiet lane in Grand Baie / La Mare Ronde, designed for families or groups needing privacy, garden space, and a private pool.

nearby_landmarks.name: Grand Baie shopping centres and restaurants
nearby_landmarks.notes: Guesty description says shopping centres, restaurants, and popular beaches are within a short walk.

operational_notes: Villa includes a master bedroom overlooking the pool with its own bathroom featuring double sinks.
Outdoor area includes garden, private pool, kiosk with barbecue setup, outdoor kitchen, outdoor shower, and outdoor toilet.
Pool and garden maintenance is scheduled twice a week.

Beach-distance wording: Guesty says popular beaches are within a short walk, but no exact walking time is confirmed. Do not invent a minute count; say the villa is in Grand Baie and popular beaches are a short walk away.

operational_mitigation_library._status: EMPTY_SCAFFOLD — populated in Phase 7 editorial review per BV-10
